title: The Reason Jahwar Turned against al-Mangur
description: The reason for that mentioned in the sources is as follows: When Jahwar put Sunbadh to flight, he took possession of the contents of his camp, including the stored treasures that Abu Muslim had left behind in al-Rayy. Then Jahwar failed to forward these things to Abu ja`far and, fearing the consequences, he turned [outright] renegade. Abu Ja`far then sent Muhammad b. al-Ash`ath alKhuza`i221 against him with a huge force. Muhammad engaged Jahwar, and they waged a hard-fought battle. With Jahwar were 218. Al-`Abbas b. Muhammad b. `Ali b. `Abdallah b.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 28
